nodes.name: === Changelog ===
nodes.info:
### 2026-05-05
- Iter3: debounce + trend.
- Per-condition debounce in `cb_evaluate`. Statistical checks (cell_delta_warn/alert, cell_outlier_*, temp_high/low_*, mosfet_temp_high) require 3 consecutive ticks (~9min @ 180s) before flipping state. Safety-critical checks (no_data, comm_dropout, cell_under, cell_over, switch_charge_off, switch_discharge_off) emit `active` immediately, require 3 clear ticks to resolve. Events (bms_reboot, cycles_reset) stay one-shot.
- Trend pipeline: `cb_trend_cron` (cronplus, hourly @ HH:05) -> `cb_trend_query` (influxdb in, raw output, 1h-bucketed MEDIAN of cell_delta over 24h GROUP BY bank) -> `cb_trend_eval` (linear regression of slope, mV/day) -> `cb_alert_out`. Threshold 5 mV/day; needs >=6 hourly buckets.

### 2026-05-05
- Iter2: monitoring pipeline. cron-plus tick @ 180s aligned -> cb_evaluate -> alert MQTT (`checkbattery/alert`) + InfluxDB `infra.bms_health`.
- Health checks: comm dropout (3min), cell delta warn/alert (50/100mV), cell hard limits (2.8/3.6V), per-cell outlier (30mV from bank avg), temperatures 1+2 (-10/50C, sensors 3/4 ignored), MOSFET temp (60C), switch charge/discharge OFF, BMS reboot, cycle counter monotonic.
- InfluxDB metrics per bank: soc_percent, total_voltage, current, power, balance_current, num_cycles, cell_delta/min/max/avg, capacity_ah, mosfet_temp, temp1, temp2.
- Alerts emit only on state transitions (active / cleared) -- no per-tick spam.

### 2026-05-05
- Bootstrap: subscribe to bat_ost, bat_west, bat_big at central MQTT broker; capture last payload per leaf-topic into `global.checkbattery_samples` for schema discovery.

nodes.name: capture
evaluate
24h cell_delta medians
nodes.query: SELECT MEDIAN(cell_delta) FROM bms_health WHERE time > now() - 24h GROUP BY time(1h), bank FILL(none)

nodes.name: trend_eval
